name: ServiceNow_CCIF_with_SNOW_Subflow_Template
description: This flow demonstrates a ServiceNow CCIF integration pattern that creates a ServiceNow voice interaction, executes a ServiceNow subflow, and then queues the contact in Webex Contact Center.

properties.name: QueueContact_ew1_hva
properties.description: Queues the contact to the target Webex Contact Center queue after the ServiceNow interaction and subflow steps complete.
properties.destination:name: WxCcQueue

properties.name: PlayMusic_mi9
properties.prompt:name: defaultmusic_on_hold.wav
properties.description: Plays music while the contact waits in the queue-handling branch.

properties.name: PlayMusic_keb
properties.prompt:name: defaultmusic_on_hold.wav
properties.description: Plays music on hold for the active in-queue wait period.

properties.name: DisconnectContact_i6c
properties.description: Disconnects the contact if the flow reaches the terminal hold branch without continuing service.

properties.name: NewPhoneContact
properties.description: Starts the inbound ServiceNow CCIF sample flow when a new phone contact arrives.

properties.name: PlayMessage_tih
properties.connector:name: Cisco Cloud Text-to-Speech

promptsTts.value: HEllo, welcome to the flow template for Cisco - Service C C I F integration
promptsTts.name: HEllo, welcome to the flow template for Cisco - Service C C I F integration

properties.description: Plays the welcome prompt before the ServiceNow interaction is created.

properties.name: SetVariable_iw8_qf0_1g5_fdz_wfq
properties.description: Sets the ServiceNow queue sys_id and captures the formatted call start time for the interaction payload.

properties.connectorId:name: SNOW CCIF Amar
properties.name: Create_Voice_Interaction_mff_oh8
properties.httpRequestMethod:name: POST
properties.httpContentType:name:name: None
properties.httpContentType:name: Application/JSON
properties.contentType:name: JSON
properties.httpContentType_name:name: None
properties.description: Creates the ServiceNow voice interaction and stores the returned interaction sys_id in sharedRecordId.

properties.name: SetVariable_subflow_params
properties.description: Sets the ServiceNow subflow name that the flow will execute after the interaction is created.

properties.connectorId:name: SNOW CCIF Amar
properties.name: Execute_Subflow
properties.httpRequestMethod:name: POST
properties.httpContentType:name:name: None
properties.httpContentType:name: Application/JSON
properties.contentType:name: JSON
properties.httpContentType_name:name: None
properties.description: Calls the ServiceNow subflow API with the caller ANI and interaction sys_id, then stores the returned status values.

properties.name: QueueContact_ew1_hva
properties.description: Queues the contact to the target Webex Contact Center queue after the ServiceNow interaction and subflow steps complete.
properties.destination:name: WxCcQueue

properties.name: PlayMusic_mi9
properties.prompt:name: defaultmusic_on_hold.wav
properties.description: Plays music while the contact waits in the queue-handling branch.

properties.name: PlayMusic_keb
properties.prompt:name: defaultmusic_on_hold.wav
properties.description: Plays music on hold for the active in-queue wait period.

properties.name: DisconnectContact_i6c
properties.description: Disconnects the contact if the flow reaches the terminal hold branch without continuing service.

properties.name: NewPhoneContact
properties.description: Starts the inbound ServiceNow CCIF sample flow when a new phone contact arrives.

properties.name: PlayMessage_tih
properties.connector:name: Cisco Cloud Text-to-Speech

promptsTts.value: HEllo, welcome to the flow template for Cisco - Service C C I F integration
promptsTts.name: HEllo, welcome to the flow template for Cisco - Service C C I F integration

properties.description: Plays the welcome prompt before the ServiceNow interaction is created.

properties.name: SetVariable_iw8_qf0_1g5_fdz_wfq
properties.description: Sets the ServiceNow queue sys_id and captures the formatted call start time for the interaction payload.

properties.connectorId:name: SNOW CCIF Amar
properties.name: Create_Voice_Interaction_mff_oh8
properties.httpRequestMethod:name: POST
properties.httpContentType:name:name: None
properties.httpContentType:name: Application/JSON
properties.contentType:name: JSON
properties.description: Creates the ServiceNow voice interaction and stores the returned interaction sys_id in sharedRecordId.

properties.name: SetVariable_subflow_params
properties.description: Sets the ServiceNow subflow name that the flow will execute after the interaction is created.

properties.connectorId:name: SNOW CCIF Amar
properties.name: Execute_Subflow
properties.httpRequestMethod:name: POST
properties.httpContentType:name:name: None
properties.httpContentType:name: Application/JSON
properties.contentType:name: JSON
properties.description: Calls the ServiceNow subflow API with the caller ANI and interaction sys_id, then stores the returned status values.

properties.name: StartMediaStream_abd
properties.description: Starts media streaming for downstream ServiceNow transcription or media processing integrations.

properties.name: EndFlow_gyj
properties.description: Ends the agent-assigned event branch after the abandoned-call flag is reset.

properties.name: AgentContactAssigned
properties.description: Handles the event that fires when an agent is assigned to the contact.

properties.name: SetVariable_mii
properties.description: Marks the call as not abandoned once an agent is assigned.

properties.name: ContactEnded
properties.description: Handles contact end events so the ServiceNow interaction can be closed when needed.

properties.name: Case_call_abandoned
properties.expression:name: BOOLEAN
properties.description: Checks whether the contact ended before an agent was assigned by evaluating Call_abandoned.

properties.connectorId:name: SNOW CCIF Amar
properties.name: HTTPRequest_kto_tny
properties.httpRequestMethod:name: PATCH
properties.httpContentType:name:name: None
properties.httpContentType:name: Application/JSON
properties.contentType:name: JSON
properties.httpContentType_name:name: None
properties.description: Updates the ServiceNow interaction to closed_abandoned when the contact ends before agent assignment.

properties.name: EndFlow_gyj_utq
properties.description: Ends the contact-ended event branch after the ServiceNow update request completes.

properties.name: AgentOfferContact
properties.description: Captures the agent-offer event as an extension point for future routing or analytics logic.

properties.name: FCAsk(ContactLastAgentRemoved)
properties.description: Captures the last-agent-removed event as an extension point for future disconnect handling.

properties.name: GlobalErrorHandling
properties.description: Captures global flow errors as an extension point for custom recovery logic.

properties.name: ContactPredial
properties.description: Captures the predial event as an extension point for outbound or callback scenarios.

properties.name: ContactOutboundCampaignResult
properties.description: Captures outbound campaign result events as an extension point for campaign follow-up logic.

properties.name: ContactCallbackFailed
properties.description: Captures callback failure events as an extension point for retry or remediation logic.

properties.name: ContactAniUpdated
properties.description: Captures ANI update events as an extension point for future synchronization logic.
